test_scenarios.given: An application load balancer with an HTTP listener (port 80) that has inline redirect to HTTPS (port 443)
An application load balancer with an HTTP listener (port 80) without redirect configuration
An application load balancer with an HTTP listener (port 80) that has an associated listener rule with redirect to HTTPS (port 443)
A network load balancer (not application type)
test_scenarios.then: The policy should pass (filtered out by load_balancer_type)

test_scenarios.given: An application load balancer with only HTTPS listeners (no HTTP on port 80)
test_scenarios.then: The policy should pass (no HTTP listeners to redirect)

test_scenarios.given: An application load balancer with an HTTP listener that redirects to wrong port (not 443)
An application load balancer with an HTTP listener that redirects to wrong protocol (not HTTPS)
